plot outline: A true story about Frank Abagnale Jr. who, before his 19th birthday, successfully conned millions of dollars worth of checks as a Pan Am pilot, doctor, and legal prosecutor. An FBI agent makes it his mission to put him behind bars. But Frank not only eludes capture, he revels in the pursuit.
title: Catch Me If You Can
akas: Arrête-moi si tu peux (Canada, French title)
Attrape-moi si tu peux (Canada, French title)
Catch me if you can - Mein Leben auf der Flucht (Germany)
